lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਰਹਨੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਉ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਗ ਪਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: khin rehan na paavau bin pag paage |
lines.english: I cannot survive, even for an instant, without the feet of my Beloved.
When God becomes Merciful, I become fortunate, and then I meet Him. ||3||
Becoming Merciful, He has united me with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.
The fire has been quenched, and I have found my Husband Lord within my own home.
Says Nanak, the Guru has dispelled my doubt. ||4||
I am now adorned with all sorts of decorations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਲੑਿਓ ਕਪਾਟੁ ਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਠਹਰਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kholaio kapaatt taa man tthaharaaee |1| rahaau doojaa |5|
lines.english: When the door is opened, then the mind is restrained. ||1||Second Pause||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਪਿਰੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh pir hai bhaaee |
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see my Husband Lord there, O Siblings of Destiny.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਤੇਰੇ ਸਾਰਿ ਸਮੑਾਲੀ ਮੋਹਿ ਨਿਰਗੁਨ ਕੇ ਦਾਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa gun tere saar samaalee mohi niragun ke daataare |
lines.english: What virtues and excellences of Yours should I cherish and contemplate? I am worthless, while You are the Great Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈ ਖਰੀਦੁ ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਇਹੁ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਥਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bai khareed kiaa kare chaturaaee ihu jeeo pindd sabh thaare |1|
lines.english: I am Your slave - what clever tricks could I ever try? This soul and body are totally Yours||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲ ਰੰਗੀਲੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਮਨਮੋਹਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਕਉ ਹਮ ਬਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laal rangeele preetam manamohan tere darasan kau ham baare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O my Darling, Blissful Beloved, who fascinates my mind - I am a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਿ ਮੈ ਤੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so kichh naahee ji mai te hovai mere tthaakur agam apaare |2|
lines.english: I cannot accomplish anything by myself, O my Unapproachable and Infinite Lord and Master. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਮੋਹਿ ਦੀਨੁ ਭੇਖਾਰੀ ਤੁਮੑ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਉਪਕਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh daataa mohi deen bhekhaaree tuma sadaa sadaa upakaare |
lines.english: O God, You are the Great Giver, and I am just a poor beggar; You are forever and ever benevolent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਲਹੀਐ ਮਨੁ ਤਰਸੈ ਚਰਨਾਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mit nahee paaeeai ant na laheeai man tarasai charanaare |3|
lines.english: Your extent cannot be found - Your limits cannot be found. My mind longs for Your Feet. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਸੇਵ ਕਮਾਵਉ ਕਿਆ ਕਹਿ ਰੀਝਾਵਉ ਬਿਧਿ ਕਿਤੁ ਪਾਵਉ ਦਰਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa sev kamaavau kiaa keh reejhaavau bidh kit paavau darasaare |
lines.english: What service can I perform? What should I say to please You? How can I gain the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵਉ ਦਾਨੁ ਢੀਠੁ ਹੋਇ ਮਾਗਉ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਸੰਤ ਰੇਨਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: paavau daan dteetth hoe maagau mukh laagai sant renaare |
lines.english: I beg with persistence to receive this gift, that the dust of the Saints might touch my face.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਗੁਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਹਾਥ ਦੇਇ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੇ ॥੪॥੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kau gur kirapaa dhaaree prabh haath dee nisataare |4|6|
lines.english: The Guru has showered His Mercy upon servant Nanak; reaching out with His Hand, God has delivered him. ||4||6||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Third House:
His service is insignificant, but his demands are very great.
This is how stubborn the false fool is! ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਮਾਨੇ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਰੀਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo pria maane tin kee reesaa |
lines.english: He competes with those who have been accepted by the Beloved Lord.
He does not obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, but he says that he has arrived there||1||
He says that he has found the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, but he cannot even get near it. ||2||
He wears religious robes, but he does not practice Truth.
He says that he is unattached, but he is intoxicated with Maya.
I am silly, stubborn and filled with sexual desire - please, liberate me! ||4||
Says Nanak, hear my prayer, God:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਨਹੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਕਹੈ ਮੁਖਿ ਰਾਤਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man nahee preet kahai mukh raataa |3|
lines.english: There is no love in his mind, and yet he says that he is imbued with the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੇ ਪੁਰਖ ਸੁਭਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੧॥੭॥
lines.translit: tuma sukhadaate purakh subhaaee |1| rahaau doojaa |1|7|
lines.english: You are the Giver of Peace, the Loving Primal Being. ||1||Second Pause||1||7||
I gaze upon the glorious greatness of the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਬੇਲਾ ਪੈ ਪੈ ਸੋਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam kee belaa pai pai soeaa |1|
lines.english: but when it is time to meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, then he sleeps. ||1||
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
He gets up early, to do his evil deeds,
The ignorant person does not take advantage of the opportunity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭ ਲਹਰਿ ਕਉ ਬਿਗਸਿ ਫੂਲਿ ਬੈਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: lobh lehar kau bigas fool baitthaa |
lines.english: He rides the waves of greed, puffed up with joy.
He is attached to Maya, and engrossed in worldly delights. ||1||Pause||
The ignorant clown will never understand.
Again and again, he becomes engrossed in entanglements. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਕਾ ਦਰਸੁ ਨ ਡੀਠਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saadh janaa kaa daras na ddeetthaa |2|
lines.english: He does not see the Blessed Vision of the Darshan of the Holy. ||2||
He listens to the sounds of sin and the music of corruption, and he is pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਸੁਨਤ ਆਲਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਕੀਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har jas sunat aalas man keenaa |3|
lines.english: His mind is too lazy to listen to the Praises of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਝੂਠੇ ਸਭਿ ਧੰਧੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chhodd jaeh jhootthe sabh dhandhe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You shall have to leave all these false affairs. ||1||Pause||
You do not see with your eyes - you are so blind!
Says Nanak, please forgive me, God.
